steps.title: Request a time
steps.description: Pick your preferred date and a morning, afternoon, or flexible time window.

sections.bioParagraph1: Evelyn started Breeze because she believes a clean home shouldn't feel like a luxury. Based in Ventura County, she and her team treat every home like their own — with care, attention to detail, and a genuine pride in making spaces shine. When you book with Breeze, you book with the best, or your money back.

reviews.quote: The house felt completely refreshed, and every detail was handled with care.
